• Show All Code
  • Hide All Code

BMI 与抑郁症状的复杂双向关系 — 高级分析

多种建模策略探索复杂关系（最终修订版）

Zhiliang Lin

2026-04-06

1 环境准备

set.seed(42)
options(scipen = 999)

library(pacman)
p_load(
  haven, tidyverse, lme4, lmerTest, lcmm, sjPlot, gtsummary,
  performance, see, naniar, patchwork,
  lavaan, mediation, interactions
)

2 数据加载与清洗

2.1 加载数据

file_path_wave_1 <- "//sciensano.be/fs/1140_LifeChron_StudentZhiliangLin/Dataset/long_covid_w1_2_6_10.sas7bdat"
file_path_wave_2_6_10_bell <- "//sciensano.be/fs/1140_LifeChron_StudentZhiliangLin/Dataset/long_cov2_6_10_bel1to9.sas7bdat"

tryCatch({
  dat_1 <- read_sas(file_path_wave_1)
  dat_2 <- read_sas(file_path_wave_2_6_10_bell)
  cat("✓ 数据成功加载\n")
}, error = function(e) {
  stop("数据加载失败: ", e$message)
})
## ✓ 数据成功加载

2.2 数据清洗

Wave 1 → Wave 2 抑郁数据替换说明：Wave 2 的原始数据中不包含抑郁量表（AD_5, AD_2），因此使用 Wave 1 的抑郁数据填入 Wave 2 的时间点。这一做法的依据是 Wave 1 和 Wave 2 的调查时间非常接近，两者在时间上可互换。

# 提取 wave 1 的抑郁数据（wave 2 原始数据中无此变量，需用 wave 1 替代）
dat_1_extract <- dat_1 %>% 
  filter(wave == 1) %>%
  dplyr::select(token, AD_5_w1 = AD_5, AD_2_w1 = AD_2) %>%
  distinct(token, .keep_all = TRUE)

# 主数据集清洗
df_clean <- dat_2 %>%
  filter(surveywave %in% c(2, 6, 10, 15, 19)) %>%
  left_join(dat_1_extract, by = "token") %>%
  mutate(
    Time = as.numeric(surveywave),
    token = as.factor(token),
    token_num = as.numeric(token),
    hc04 = as.factor(hc04),
    et_1_ref = as.factor(et_1_ref),
    
    # wave 2 使用 wave 1 的抑郁数据
    AD_5 = ifelse(Time == 2, AD_5_w1, AD_5),
    AD_2 = ifelse(Time == 2, AD_2_w1, AD_2),
    
    Phase = ifelse(Time %in% c(2, 6, 10), "During-Pandemic", "Post-Pandemic"),
    Phase = factor(Phase, levels = c("During-Pandemic", "Post-Pandemic"))
  ) %>%
  dplyr::select(-AD_5_w1, -AD_2_w1)

df_model <- df_clean %>%
  group_by(token) %>%
  fill(et_1_ref, hc_01_ref, .direction = "downup") %>%
  ungroup()

# [修复] 清除年龄异常值（max=119 是数据录入错误）
df_model <- df_model %>%
  mutate(hc_01_ref = ifelse(hc_01_ref > 100, NA, hc_01_ref)) %>%
  mutate(Age_centered = hc_01_ref - mean(hc_01_ref, na.rm = TRUE))

# BMI 分类变量
df_model <- df_model %>%
  mutate(
    BMI_category = case_when(
      NS_1 < 18.5 ~ "Underweight",
      NS_1 >= 18.5 & NS_1 < 25 ~ "Normal",
      NS_1 >= 25 & NS_1 < 30 ~ "Overweight",
      NS_1 >= 30 ~ "Obese",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    ),
    BMI_category = factor(BMI_category, 
                          levels = c("Normal", "Underweight", "Overweight", "Obese"))
  )

cat("✓ 数据清洗完成（全样本）\n")
## ✓ 数据清洗完成（全样本）
cat(sprintf("  全样本: %d 观测, %d 个体\n", nrow(df_model), n_distinct(df_model$token)))
##   全样本: 65764 观测, 37293 个体

2.3 纵向分析样本筛选

说明：59% 的个体仅参与了 1 个波次，无法提供任何纵向信息。纵向分析（双向模型、滞后模型、LCGA、CLPM 等）要求每人至少有 2 个有效观测点。这里筛选参与 ≥2 个波次且关键变量不缺失的个体作为主要分析样本。

# 统计每人有效波次数（BMI 和抑郁均不缺失）
tokens_multi_wave <- df_model %>%
  filter(!is.na(AD_5) & !is.na(NS_1)) %>%
  group_by(token) %>%
  summarise(n_waves_valid = n_distinct(Time), .groups = "drop") %>%
  filter(n_waves_valid >= 2) %>%
  pull(token)

df_longitudinal <- df_model %>%
  filter(token %in% tokens_multi_wave)

cat(sprintf("✓ 纵向分析样本: %d 观测, %d 个体 (≥2 waves with valid BMI & Depression)\n",
            nrow(df_longitudinal), n_distinct(df_longitudinal$token)))
## ✓ 纵向分析样本: 38535 观测, 12808 个体 (≥2 waves with valid BMI & Depression)
# 比较全样本 vs 纵向样本的基线特征
cat("\n全样本 vs 纵向样本基线比较：\n")
## 
## 全样本 vs 纵向样本基线比较：
baseline_compare <- df_model %>%
  filter(Time == 2) %>%
  mutate(sample = ifelse(token %in% tokens_multi_wave, 
                         "Longitudinal (≥2 waves)", "Single wave only")) %>%
  dplyr::select(sample, NS_1, AD_5, hc_01_ref, hc04) %>%
  tbl_summary(
    by = sample,
    label = list(NS_1 ~ "BMI", AD_5 ~ "Depression", hc_01_ref ~ "Age", hc04 ~ "Sex"),
    statistic = list(all_continuous() ~ "{mean} ({sd})"),
    missing = "no"
  ) %>%
  add_p() %>%
  bold_p() %>%
  bold_labels()

baseline_compare
Characteristic Longitudinal (≥2 waves)
N = 8,3641		 Single wave only
N = 17,6001		 p-value2
BMI 25.9 (4.8) 25.9 (5.0) 0.9
Depression

<0.001
    0 3,812 (62%) 3,622 (54%)
    1 1,489 (24%) 1,775 (27%)
    2 495 (8.0%) 699 (10%)
    3 245 (4.0%) 375 (5.6%)
    4 147 (2.4%) 198 (3.0%)
Age 53 (14) 48 (14) <0.001
Sex

<0.001
    1 2,870 (34%) 5,446 (31%)
    2 5,494 (66%) 12,154 (69%)
1 Mean (SD); n (%)
2 Wilcoxon rank sum test; Pearson’s Chi-squared test

3 描述性统计

3.1 Table 1: 样本基本特征

df_baseline <- df_model %>% filter(Time == 2)

table1 <- df_baseline %>%
  dplyr::select(
    `BMI` = NS_1, `Depression (AD_5)` = AD_5, `Age` = hc_01_ref,
    `Sex` = hc04, `Education` = et_1_ref, `BMI Category` = BMI_category
  ) %>%
  tbl_summary(
    type = list(`BMI` ~ "continuous2", `Depression (AD_5)` ~ "continuous2", `Age` ~ "continuous2"),
    statistic = list(all_continuous2() ~ c("{mean} ({sd})", "{median} ({p25}, {p75})", "{min}, {max}")),
    label = list(`Sex` ~ "Sex (1=Male, 2=Female)", `Education` ~ "Education Level"),
    missing_text = "Missing"
  ) %>%
  bold_labels()

table1
Characteristic N = 25,9641
BMI - continuous
    Mean (SD) 25.9 (4.9)
    Median (Q1, Q3) 25.1 (22.5, 28.6)
    Min, Max 14.8, 55.4
    Missing 293
Depression (AD_5)
    Mean (SD) 0.69 (1.01)
    Median (Q1, Q3) 0.00 (0.00, 1.00)
    Min, Max 0.00, 4.00
    Missing 13,107
Age
    Mean (SD) 50 (14)
    Median (Q1, Q3) 50 (39, 61)
    Min, Max 18, 97
    Missing 2
Sex (1=Male, 2=Female)

    2 17,648 (68%)
Education Level

    2 18,676 (73%)
    Missing 464
BMI Category
    Normal 12,011 (47%)
    Underweight 561 (2.2%)
    Overweight 8,425 (33%)
    Obese 4,674 (18%)
    Missing 293
1 n (%)

3.2 Table 2: 各波次关键变量描述

df_model %>%
  group_by(Wave = Time) %>%
  summarise(
    N = n(), `N individuals` = n_distinct(token),
    `BMI Mean` = mean(NS_1, na.rm = TRUE), `BMI SD` = sd(NS_1, na.rm = TRUE),
    `Dep Mean` = mean(AD_5, na.rm = TRUE), `Dep SD` = sd(AD_5, na.rm = TRUE),
    `% Female` = round(mean(hc04 == 2, na.rm = TRUE) * 100, 1),
    `Mean Age` = mean(hc_01_ref, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  knitr::kable(digits = 2, caption = "Descriptive Statistics by Survey Wave")
Descriptive Statistics by Survey Wave
Wave N N individuals BMI Mean BMI SD Dep Mean Dep SD % Female Mean Age
2 25964 25958 25.94 4.93 0.69 1.01 68.0 49.82
6 15684 15681 26.13 4.95 0.69 1.04 63.6 52.70
10 11401 11401 26.47 6.35 0.59 0.97 63.0 53.86
15 6409 6409 26.37 4.95 0.58 0.94 59.0 56.25
19 6306 6306 26.40 5.03 0.55 0.91 60.5 55.90

3.3 Table 3: BMI 分类分布（各波次）

df_model %>%
  filter(!is.na(BMI_category)) %>%
  group_by(Time, BMI_category) %>%
  summarise(n = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
  group_by(Time) %>%
  mutate(pct = round(n / sum(n) * 100, 1),
         label = sprintf("%d (%.1f%%)", n, pct)) %>%
  dplyr::select(Time, BMI_category, label) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = BMI_category, values_from = label) %>%
  knitr::kable(caption = "BMI Category Distribution by Wave — N (%)")
BMI Category Distribution by Wave — N (%)
Time Normal Underweight Overweight Obese
2 12011 (46.8%) 561 (2.2%) 8425 (32.8%) 4674 (18.2%)
6 6907 (44.7%) 326 (2.1%) 5273 (34.1%) 2961 (19.1%)
10 4757 (42.3%) 258 (2.3%) 3966 (35.3%) 2255 (20.1%)
15 2597 (40.9%) 144 (2.3%) 2311 (36.4%) 1299 (20.5%)
19 2599 (41.6%) 135 (2.2%) 2258 (36.2%) 1250 (20.0%)

3.4 参与模式与样本流失

participation <- df_model %>%
  group_by(token) %>%
  summarise(n_waves = n_distinct(Time), .groups = "drop")

cat("每人参与波次数量分布：\n")
## 每人参与波次数量分布：
print(table(participation$n_waves))
## 
##     1     2     3     4     5 
## 21872  7699  3875  2375  1472
cat(sprintf("\n参与所有 5 个波次: %d (%.1f%%)\n",
            sum(participation$n_waves == 5), mean(participation$n_waves == 5) * 100))
## 
## 参与所有 5 个波次: 1472 (3.9%)
# 流失率可视化
retention <- df_model %>%
  group_by(Time) %>%
  summarise(n = n_distinct(token), .groups = "drop") %>%
  mutate(retention_pct = n / max(n) * 100,
         label = sprintf("N = %s\n(%.0f%%)", format(n, big.mark = ","), retention_pct))

ggplot(retention, aes(x = factor(Time), y = n)) +
  geom_col(fill = "#3498DB", alpha = 0.8, width = 0.6) +
  geom_text(aes(label = label), vjust = -0.3, size = 3.5) +
  scale_y_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.15))) +
  labs(title = "Participant Retention Across Survey Waves",
       x = "Survey Wave", y = "Number of Unique Participants") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12)

Participant Retention Across Waves 

baseline_all <- df_model %>%
  filter(Time == 2) %>%
  dplyr::select(token, NS_1, AD_5, hc_01_ref, hc04)

last_wave_participants <- df_model %>% filter(Time == 19) %>% distinct(token)

baseline_all %>%
  mutate(retained = ifelse(token %in% last_wave_participants$token, 
                           "Retained to Wave 19", "Dropped out")) %>%
  dplyr::select(-token) %>%
  tbl_summary(
    by = retained,
    label = list(NS_1 ~ "Baseline BMI", AD_5 ~ "Baseline Depression",
                 hc_01_ref ~ "Age", hc04 ~ "Sex"),
    statistic = list(all_continuous() ~ "{mean} ({sd})"), missing = "no"
  ) %>%
  add_p() %>% bold_p() %>% bold_labels()
Characteristic Dropped out
N = 22,6981		 Retained to Wave 19
N = 3,2661		 p-value2
Baseline BMI 25.9 (5.0) 26.0 (4.7) 0.003
Baseline Depression

<0.001
    0 6,164 (56%) 1,270 (66%)
    1 2,821 (26%) 443 (23%)
    2 1,073 (9.8%) 121 (6.3%)
    3 565 (5.2%) 55 (2.8%)
    4 302 (2.8%) 43 (2.2%)
Age 49 (14) 56 (13) <0.001
Sex

<0.001
    1 7,107 (31%) 1,209 (37%)
    2 15,591 (69%) 2,057 (63%)
1 Mean (SD); n (%)
2 Wilcoxon rank sum test; Pearson’s Chi-squared test

3.5 缺失数据

df_model %>%
  group_by(Wave = Time) %>%
  summarise(
    `BMI missing (%)` = round(mean(is.na(NS_1)) * 100, 1),
    `Depression missing (%)` = round(mean(is.na(AD_5)) * 100, 1),
    `Age missing (%)` = round(mean(is.na(hc_01_ref)) * 100, 1),
    `Sex missing (%)` = round(mean(is.na(hc04)) * 100, 1),
    `Education missing (%)` = round(mean(is.na(et_1_ref)) * 100, 1),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  knitr::kable(caption = "Percentage of Missing Values by Wave")
Percentage of Missing Values by Wave
Wave BMI missing (%) Depression missing (%) Age missing (%) Sex missing (%) Education missing (%)
2 1.1 50.5 0.0 0.0 1.8
6 1.4 1.3 0.0 0.0 0.9
10 1.4 0.8 0.0 0.0 0.7
15 0.9 2.0 0.0 0.1 0.0
19 1.0 1.8 0.1 0.1 0.1 
# 完整案例数
df_model %>%
  filter(!is.na(NS_1) & !is.na(AD_5) & !is.na(hc04) & !is.na(et_1_ref) & !is.na(hc_01_ref)) %>%
  group_by(Time) %>%
  summarise(n_complete = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
  knitr::kable(caption = "Complete Cases per Wave (all model variables present)")
Complete Cases per Wave (all model variables present)
Time n_complete
2 12565
6 15142
10 11078
15 6220
19 6125

3.6 变量分布

p_bmi_dist <- df_model %>%
  filter(!is.na(NS_1)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = NS_1)) +
  geom_histogram(bins = 40, fill = "#3498DB", alpha = 0.7, color = "white") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = c(18.5, 25, 30), linetype = "dashed", color = "red", alpha = 0.6) +
  facet_wrap(~ paste("Wave", Time), nrow = 1) +
  labs(title = "BMI Distribution by Wave",
       subtitle = "Dashed lines: WHO cutoffs (18.5, 25, 30)",
       x = "BMI", y = "Count") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 10)

p_dep_dist <- df_model %>%
  filter(!is.na(AD_5)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = AD_5)) +
  geom_histogram(bins = 30, fill = "#E74C3C", alpha = 0.7, color = "white") +
  facet_wrap(~ paste("Wave", Time), nrow = 1) +
  labs(title = "Depression Score Distribution by Wave",
       x = "Depression Score (AD_5)", y = "Count") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 10)

p_age_dist <- df_model %>%
  filter(Time == 2 & !is.na(hc_01_ref)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = hc_01_ref)) +
  geom_histogram(bins = 30, fill = "#2ECC71", alpha = 0.7, color = "white") +
  labs(title = "Age Distribution (Baseline)", x = "Age", y = "Count") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 10)

p_sex_dist <- df_model %>%
  filter(Time == 2 & !is.na(hc04)) %>%
  count(hc04) %>%
  mutate(sex_label = ifelse(hc04 == 1, "Male", "Female"),
         pct = round(n / sum(n) * 100, 1),
         label = sprintf("%s\n(%.1f%%)", format(n, big.mark = ","), pct)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = sex_label, y = n, fill = sex_label)) +
  geom_col(alpha = 0.8, width = 0.5) +
  geom_text(aes(label = label), vjust = -0.3, size = 3.5) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Male" = "#3498DB", "Female" = "#E74C3C")) +
  scale_y_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.15))) +
  labs(title = "Sex Distribution (Baseline)", x = "", y = "Count") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 10) + theme(legend.position = "none")

(p_bmi_dist / p_dep_dist) / (p_age_dist + p_sex_dist) +
  plot_annotation(title = "Distribution of Key Variables")

Distribution of Key Variables

3.7 BMI 与抑郁的相关性

cor_by_wave <- df_model %>%
  filter(!is.na(NS_1) & !is.na(AD_5)) %>%
  group_by(Time) %>%
  summarise(r = cor(NS_1, AD_5), n = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
  mutate(t_stat = r * sqrt((n - 2) / (1 - r^2)),
         p_value = 2 * pt(abs(t_stat), df = n - 2, lower.tail = FALSE),
         sig = ifelse(p_value < 0.001, "***", ifelse(p_value < 0.01, "**", 
               ifelse(p_value < 0.05, "*", "ns"))))

cor_by_wave %>%
  dplyr::select(Wave = Time, `Pearson r` = r, N = n, `p-value` = p_value, Sig = sig) %>%
  knitr::kable(digits = 4, caption = "BMI-Depression Correlation by Wave")
BMI-Depression Correlation by Wave
Wave Pearson r N p-value Sig
2 0.0765 12709 0 ***
6 0.0863 15275 0 ***
10 0.0663 11149 0 ***
15 0.1067 6224 0 ***
19 0.1096 6131 0 *** 
df_model %>%
  filter(!is.na(NS_1) & !is.na(AD_5)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = NS_1, y = AD_5)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.05, size = 0.5) +
  geom_smooth(method = "loess", color = "#E74C3C", se = TRUE, linewidth = 1) +
  facet_wrap(~ paste("Wave", Time), nrow = 1) +
  labs(title = "BMI vs Depression Score by Wave",
       subtitle = "LOESS smoothing curve with 95% CI",
       x = "BMI", y = "Depression Score (AD_5)") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 10)

BMI-Depression Correlation by Wave

3.8 纵向变化趋势

trends <- df_model %>%
  group_by(Time) %>%
  summarise(BMI = mean(NS_1, na.rm = TRUE),
            BMI_se = sd(NS_1, na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(sum(!is.na(NS_1))),
            Depression = mean(AD_5, na.rm = TRUE),
            Depression_se = sd(AD_5, na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(sum(!is.na(AD_5))),
            .groups = "drop")

p_trend_bmi <- ggplot(trends, aes(x = Time, y = BMI)) +
  geom_line(color = "#3498DB", linewidth = 1.2) + geom_point(color = "#3498DB", size = 3) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = BMI - 1.96*BMI_se, ymax = BMI + 1.96*BMI_se), width = 0.4, color = "#3498DB") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 12.5, linetype = "dashed", alpha = 0.5) +
  annotate("text", x = 7, y = max(trends$BMI), label = "During Pandemic", size = 3, alpha = 0.6) +
  annotate("text", x = 17, y = max(trends$BMI), label = "Post Pandemic", size = 3, alpha = 0.6) +
  labs(title = "Mean BMI Over Time", x = "Survey Wave", y = "Mean BMI") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12)

p_trend_dep <- ggplot(trends, aes(x = Time, y = Depression)) +
  geom_line(color = "#E74C3C", linewidth = 1.2) + geom_point(color = "#E74C3C", size = 3) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = Depression - 1.96*Depression_se, ymax = Depression + 1.96*Depression_se),
                width = 0.4, color = "#E74C3C") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 12.5, linetype = "dashed", alpha = 0.5) +
  annotate("text", x = 7, y = max(trends$Depression), label = "During Pandemic", size = 3, alpha = 0.6) +
  annotate("text", x = 17, y = max(trends$Depression), label = "Post Pandemic", size = 3, alpha = 0.6) +
  labs(title = "Mean Depression Score Over Time", x = "Survey Wave", y = "Mean Depression (AD_5)") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12)

p_trend_bmi + p_trend_dep

Longitudinal Trends in BMI and Depression

3.9 各 BMI 类别的抑郁得分（基线）

df_baseline_bmi <- df_model %>%
  filter(Time == 2 & !is.na(BMI_category) & !is.na(AD_5))

df_baseline_bmi %>%
  dplyr::select(`BMI Category` = BMI_category, `Depression` = AD_5) %>%
  tbl_summary(by = `BMI Category`,
              statistic = list(all_continuous() ~ "{mean} ({sd})"),
              label = list(Depression ~ "Depression Score (AD_5)")) %>%
  add_p() %>% bold_p() %>% bold_labels()
Characteristic Normal
N = 6,2201		 Underweight
N = 2701		 Overweight
N = 4,0401		 Obese
N = 2,1791		 p-value2
Depression Score (AD_5)



<0.001
    0 3,692 (59%) 133 (49%) 2,443 (60%) 1,081 (50%)
    1 1,590 (26%) 73 (27%) 965 (24%) 601 (28%)
    2 538 (8.6%) 37 (14%) 346 (8.6%) 258 (12%)
    3 246 (4.0%) 19 (7.0%) 194 (4.8%) 150 (6.9%)
    4 154 (2.5%) 8 (3.0%) 92 (2.3%) 89 (4.1%)
1 n (%)
2 Pearson’s Chi-squared test 
df_baseline_bmi %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = BMI_category, y = AD_5, fill = BMI_category)) +
  geom_boxplot(alpha = 0.7, outlier.alpha = 0.2, outlier.size = 0.5) +
  stat_summary(fun = mean, geom = "point", shape = 18, size = 3, color = "black") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Normal"="#2ECC71","Underweight"="#F39C12",
                                "Overweight"="#3498DB","Obese"="#E74C3C")) +
  labs(title = "Depression Score by BMI Category (Baseline, Wave 2)",
       subtitle = "Diamond = group mean", x = "BMI Category", y = "Depression Score (AD_5)") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) + theme(legend.position = "none")

Depression Score by BMI Category at Baseline

4 第一部分：BMI 与抑郁的双向关系分析

注意：以下纵向分析均使用 df_longitudinal（≥2 波次样本）。

4.1 基础双向线性混合模型

4.1.1 方向 A: BMI → 抑郁

m_bmi_to_dep <- lmer(
  AD_5 ~ NS_1 * Time + Age_centered + hc04 + et_1_ref + (1 | token),
  data = df_longitudinal, REML = FALSE,
  control = lmerControl(optimizer = "bobyqa", optCtrl = list(maxfun = 2e5))
)

summary(m_bmi_to_dep)
## Linear mixed model fit by maximum likelihood . t-tests use Satterthwaite's
##   method [lmerModLmerTest]
## Formula: AD_5 ~ NS_1 * Time + Age_centered + hc04 + et_1_ref + (1 | token)
##    Data: df_longitudinal
## Control: lmerControl(optimizer = "bobyqa", optCtrl = list(maxfun = 200000))
## 
##       AIC       BIC    logLik -2*log(L)  df.resid 
##   85049.7   85126.1  -42515.9   85031.7     35866 
## 
## Scaled residuals: 
##     Min      1Q  Median      3Q     Max 
## -3.9991 -0.3469 -0.1458  0.1622  5.4330 
## 
## Random effects:
##  Groups   Name        Variance Std.Dev.
##  token    (Intercept) 0.5148   0.7175  
##  Residual             0.3560   0.5966  
## Number of obs: 35875, groups:  token, 12769
## 
## Fixed effects:
##                    Estimate     Std. Error             df t value
## (Intercept)      0.32212757     0.04991867 35287.39434597   6.453
## NS_1             0.01282141     0.00173964 35823.27993186   7.370
## Time            -0.00342634     0.00356831 28505.52988890  -0.960
## Age_centered    -0.01402761     0.00053714 12854.37921817 -26.115
## hc042            0.14526324     0.01506173 13018.44712387   9.645
## et_1_ref2       -0.12916189     0.01650756 13526.59053073  -7.824
## NS_1:Time        0.00001821     0.00013376 28536.26012660   0.136
##                          Pr(>|t|)    
## (Intercept)   0.00000000011104138 ***
## NS_1          0.00000000000017412 ***
## Time                        0.337    
## Age_centered < 0.0000000000000002 ***
## hc042        < 0.0000000000000002 ***
## et_1_ref2     0.00000000000000548 ***
## NS_1:Time                   0.892    
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## Correlation of Fixed Effects:
##             (Intr) NS_1   Time   Ag_cnt hc042  et_1_2
## NS_1        -0.932                                   
## Time        -0.703  0.745                            
## Age_centerd -0.025 -0.054 -0.035                     
## hc042       -0.227  0.047  0.006  0.196              
## et_1_ref2   -0.295  0.060  0.007  0.102 -0.044       
## NS_1:Time    0.696 -0.762 -0.983  0.025 -0.004 -0.009
cat("\n效应量（R²）：\n")
## 
## 效应量（R²）：
print(r2_nakagawa(m_bmi_to_dep))
## # R2 for Mixed Models
## 
##   Conditional R2: 0.613
##      Marginal R2: 0.054

4.1.2 方向 B: 抑郁 → BMI

m_dep_to_bmi <- lmer(
  NS_1 ~ AD_5 * Time + Age_centered + hc04 + et_1_ref + (1 | token),
  data = df_longitudinal, REML = FALSE,
  control = lmerControl(optimizer = "bobyqa", optCtrl = list(maxfun = 2e5))
)

summary(m_dep_to_bmi)
## Linear mixed model fit by maximum likelihood . t-tests use Satterthwaite's
##   method [lmerModLmerTest]
## Formula: NS_1 ~ AD_5 * Time + Age_centered + hc04 + et_1_ref + (1 | token)
##    Data: df_longitudinal
## Control: lmerControl(optimizer = "bobyqa", optCtrl = list(maxfun = 200000))
## 
##       AIC       BIC    logLik -2*log(L)  df.resid 
##  191784.6  191861.0  -95883.3  191766.6     35866 
## 
## Scaled residuals: 
##     Min      1Q  Median      3Q     Max 
## -22.241  -0.240  -0.040   0.206  51.289 
## 
## Random effects:
##  Groups   Name        Variance Std.Dev.
##  token    (Intercept) 21.700   4.658   
##  Residual              4.969   2.229   
## Number of obs: 35875, groups:  token, 12769
## 
## Fixed effects:
##                  Estimate   Std. Error           df t value
## (Intercept)     27.411893     0.105185 16792.754422 260.607
## AD_5             0.062722     0.034167 28363.578299   1.836
## Time             0.012560     0.002966 25145.601071   4.234
## Age_centered     0.028159     0.003224 13249.275540   8.733
## hc042           -0.938825     0.089214 14011.156318 -10.523
## et_1_ref2       -1.122284     0.096416 15198.918088 -11.640
## AD_5:Time        0.009858     0.002793 25503.207544   3.529
##                          Pr(>|t|)    
## (Intercept)  < 0.0000000000000002 ***
## AD_5                     0.066406 .  
## Time                     0.000023 ***
## Age_centered < 0.0000000000000002 ***
## hc042        < 0.0000000000000002 ***
## et_1_ref2    < 0.0000000000000002 ***
## AD_5:Time                0.000418 ***
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## Correlation of Fixed Effects:
##             (Intr) AD_5   Time   Ag_cnt hc042  et_1_2
## AD_5        -0.198                                   
## Time        -0.267  0.405                            
## Age_centerd -0.231  0.065 -0.027                     
## hc042       -0.508 -0.025  0.006  0.196              
## et_1_ref2   -0.671  0.021 -0.007  0.107 -0.047       
## AD_5:Time    0.139 -0.757 -0.517 -0.005  0.004 -0.001
cat("\n效应量（R²）：\n")
## 
## 效应量（R²）：
print(r2_nakagawa(m_dep_to_bmi))
## # R2 for Mixed Models
## 
##   Conditional R2: 0.819
##      Marginal R2: 0.028

4.1.3 对比表格

tab_model(
  m_bmi_to_dep, m_dep_to_bmi,
  show.ci = 0.95, show.se = TRUE,
  dv.labels = c("BMI → Depression", "Depression → BMI"),
  pred.labels = c("NS_1" = "BMI", "AD_5" = "Depression", "Time" = "Time",
                  "NS_1:Time" = "BMI × Time", "AD_5:Time" = "Depression × Time")
)
  BMI → Depression Depression → BMI
Predictors Estimates std. Error CI p Estimates std. Error CI p
(Intercept) 0.32 0.05 0.22 – 0.42 <0.001 27.41 0.11 27.21 – 27.62 <0.001
BMI 0.01 0.00 0.01 – 0.02 <0.001
Time -0.00 0.00 -0.01 – 0.00 0.337 0.01 0.00 0.01 – 0.02 <0.001
Age_centered -0.01 0.00 -0.02 – -0.01 <0.001 0.03 0.00 0.02 – 0.03 <0.001
hc042 0.15 0.02 0.12 – 0.17 <0.001 -0.94 0.09 -1.11 – -0.76 <0.001
et_1_ref2 -0.13 0.02 -0.16 – -0.10 <0.001 -1.12 0.10 -1.31 – -0.93 <0.001
BMI × Time 0.00 0.00 -0.00 – 0.00 0.892
Depression 0.06 0.03 -0.00 – 0.13 0.066
Depression × Time 0.01 0.00 0.00 – 0.02 <0.001
Random Effects
σ2 0.36 4.97
τ00 0.51 token 21.70 token
ICC 0.59 0.81
N 12769 token 12769 token
Observations 35875 35875
Marginal R2 / Conditional R2 0.054 / 0.613 0.028 / 0.819

4.2 滞后效应分析

df_lagged <- df_longitudinal %>%
  arrange(token, Time) %>%
  group_by(token) %>%
  mutate(BMI_lag1 = lag(NS_1, 1), Depression_lag1 = lag(AD_5, 1)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  filter(!is.na(BMI_lag1) & !is.na(Depression_lag1))

cat(sprintf("滞后分析样本: %d 观测, %d 个体\n", nrow(df_lagged), n_distinct(df_lagged$token)))
## 滞后分析样本: 23300 观测, 12808 个体
m_lagged_bmi_dep <- lmer(
  AD_5 ~ BMI_lag1 + NS_1 + Depression_lag1 + Time + 
    Age_centered + hc04 + et_1_ref + (1 | token),
  data = df_lagged, REML = FALSE,
  control = lmerControl(optimizer = "bobyqa", check.conv.singular = "ignore")
)

m_lagged_dep_bmi <- lmer(
  NS_1 ~ Depression_lag1 + AD_5 + BMI_lag1 + Time + 
    Age_centered + hc04 + et_1_ref + (1 | token),
  data = df_lagged, REML = FALSE,
  control = lmerControl(optimizer = "bobyqa", check.conv.singular = "ignore")
)

cat("\n关键发现（滞后效应）：\n")
## 
## 关键发现（滞后效应）：
cat(sprintf("  上期 BMI → 当期抑郁: β = %.3f, p = %.4f\n",
            fixef(m_lagged_bmi_dep)["BMI_lag1"],
            summary(m_lagged_bmi_dep)$coefficients["BMI_lag1", "Pr(>|t|)"]))
##   上期 BMI → 当期抑郁: β = 0.002, p = 0.2168
cat(sprintf("  上期抑郁 → 当期 BMI: β = %.3f, p = %.4f\n",
            fixef(m_lagged_dep_bmi)["Depression_lag1"],
            summary(m_lagged_dep_bmi)$coefficients["Depression_lag1", "Pr(>|t|)"]))
##   上期抑郁 → 当期 BMI: β = 0.048, p = 0.0931
tab_model(
  m_lagged_bmi_dep, m_lagged_dep_bmi,
  show.ci = 0.95, show.se = TRUE,
  dv.labels = c("Lagged BMI → Depression", "Lagged Depression → BMI")
)
  Lagged BMI → Depression Lagged Depression → BMI
Predictors Estimates std. Error CI p Estimates std. Error CI p
(Intercept) 0.09 0.03 0.03 – 0.15 0.005 5.17 0.13 4.90 – 5.43 <0.001
BMI_lag1 0.00 0.00 -0.00 – 0.00 0.217 0.82 0.00 0.81 – 0.82 <0.001
BMI - continuous 0.01 0.00 0.00 – 0.01 <0.001
Depression_lag1 0.60 0.01 0.58 – 0.61 <0.001 0.05 0.03 -0.01 – 0.10 0.093
Time -0.00 0.00 -0.01 – -0.00 <0.001 -0.01 0.00 -0.02 – -0.00 0.024
Age_centered -0.00 0.00 -0.01 – -0.00 <0.001 -0.00 0.00 -0.00 – 0.00 0.642
hc04: hc042 0.04 0.01 0.02 – 0.06 <0.001 -0.16 0.05 -0.24 – -0.07 0.001
et_1_ref: et_1_ref2 -0.05 0.01 -0.07 – -0.03 <0.001 -0.16 0.05 -0.26 – -0.06 0.002
AD_5 0.11 0.03 0.06 – 0.17 <0.001
Random Effects
σ2 0.54 10.34
τ00 0.00 token 0.00 token
N 12713 token 12713 token
Observations 22959 22959
Marginal R2 / Conditional R2 0.397 / NA 0.645 / NA

4.3 疫情阶段调节效应

m_phase_mod_dep <- lmer(
  AD_5 ~ NS_1 * Phase + Age_centered + hc04 + et_1_ref + (1 | token),
  data = df_longitudinal, REML = FALSE
)

m_phase_mod_bmi <- lmer(
  NS_1 ~ AD_5 * Phase + Age_centered + hc04 + et_1_ref + (1 | token),
  data = df_longitudinal, REML = FALSE
)

tab_model(
  m_phase_mod_dep, m_phase_mod_bmi,
  show.ci = 0.95,
  dv.labels = c("BMI → Depression (Phase Mod.)", "Depression → BMI (Phase Mod.)")
)
  BMI → Depression (Phase Mod.) Depression → BMI (Phase Mod.)
Predictors Estimates CI p Estimates CI p
(Intercept) 0.31 0.24 – 0.38 <0.001 27.52 27.32 – 27.72 <0.001
BMI - continuous 0.01 0.01 – 0.01 <0.001

Age_centered -0.01 -0.02 – -0.01 <0.001 0.03 0.02 – 0.04 <0.001

et_1_ref: et_1_ref2 -0.13 -0.16 – -0.10 <0.001 -1.12 -1.31 – -0.93 <0.001

AD_5 0.12 0.08 – 0.17 <0.001
AD_5:PhasePost-Pandemic 0.09 0.03 – 0.16 0.005
Random Effects
σ2 0.36 4.98
τ00 0.51 token 21.71 token
ICC 0.59 0.81
N 12769 token 12769 token
Observations 35875 35875
Marginal R2 / Conditional R2 0.054 / 0.613 0.027 / 0.819 
# 手动预测，避免 OOM
bmi_range <- seq(quantile(df_longitudinal$NS_1, 0.05, na.rm = TRUE),
                 quantile(df_longitudinal$NS_1, 0.95, na.rm = TRUE), length.out = 50)

newdata_dep <- expand.grid(NS_1 = bmi_range, Phase = levels(df_longitudinal$Phase)) %>%
  mutate(Age_centered = 0,
         hc04 = factor(levels(df_longitudinal$hc04)[1], levels = levels(df_longitudinal$hc04)),
         et_1_ref = factor(levels(df_longitudinal$et_1_ref)[1], levels = levels(df_longitudinal$et_1_ref)))
newdata_dep$pred <- predict(m_phase_mod_dep, newdata = newdata_dep, re.form = NA)

p_phase_dep <- ggplot(newdata_dep, aes(x = NS_1, y = pred, color = Phase)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.2) +
  labs(title = "BMI → Depression by Phase", x = "BMI", y = "Predicted Depression") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12)

dep_range <- seq(quantile(df_longitudinal$AD_5, 0.05, na.rm = TRUE),
                 quantile(df_longitudinal$AD_5, 0.95, na.rm = TRUE), length.out = 50)

newdata_bmi <- expand.grid(AD_5 = dep_range, Phase = levels(df_longitudinal$Phase)) %>%
  mutate(Age_centered = 0,
         hc04 = factor(levels(df_longitudinal$hc04)[1], levels = levels(df_longitudinal$hc04)),
         et_1_ref = factor(levels(df_longitudinal$et_1_ref)[1], levels = levels(df_longitudinal$et_1_ref)))
newdata_bmi$pred <- predict(m_phase_mod_bmi, newdata = newdata_bmi, re.form = NA)

p_phase_bmi <- ggplot(newdata_bmi, aes(x = AD_5, y = pred, color = Phase)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.2) +
  labs(title = "Depression → BMI by Phase", x = "Depression Score", y = "Predicted BMI") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12)

p_phase_dep + p_phase_bmi

BMI-Depression Association by Pandemic Phase

5 第二部分：潜类别轨迹分析

5.1 抑郁症状的潜类别轨迹

# [修复] 使用纵向样本，确保每人 ≥2 观测
df_lcmm <- df_longitudinal %>%
  filter(!is.na(AD_5) & !is.na(NS_1) & !is.na(Time) &
         !is.na(Age_centered) & !is.na(hc04) & !is.na(et_1_ref)) %>%
  as.data.frame()

cat(sprintf("LCGA 样本: %d 观测, %d 个体\n", nrow(df_lcmm), n_distinct(df_lcmm$token_num)))
## LCGA 样本: 35875 观测, 12769 个体
# 1 类基准模型
m_dep_lcga_1 <- hlme(
  AD_5 ~ Time + Age_centered + hc04 + et_1_ref,
  random = ~ 1, subject = 'token_num', ng = 1, 
  data = df_lcmm, verbose = FALSE
)

# [修复] 使用 gridsearch 代替手动循环
cat("\n拟合 2 类抑郁轨迹模型...\n")
## 
## 拟合 2 类抑郁轨迹模型...
m_dep_lcga_2 <- tryCatch({
  gridsearch(
    rep = 50, maxiter = 30, minit = m_dep_lcga_1,
    hlme(AD_5 ~ Time + Age_centered + hc04 + et_1_ref,
         mixture = ~ Time, random = ~ 1, subject = 'token_num', ng = 2,
         data = df_lcmm, verbose = FALSE, maxiter = 1000)
  )
}, error = function(e) { cat(sprintf("  ✗ 失败: %s\n", e$message)); NULL })

cat("拟合 3 类抑郁轨迹模型...\n")
## 拟合 3 类抑郁轨迹模型...
m_dep_lcga_3 <- tryCatch({
  gridsearch(
    rep = 50, maxiter = 30, minit = m_dep_lcga_1,
    hlme(AD_5 ~ Time + Age_centered + hc04 + et_1_ref,
         mixture = ~ Time, random = ~ 1, subject = 'token_num', ng = 3,
         data = df_lcmm, verbose = FALSE, maxiter = 1000)
  )
}, error = function(e) { cat(sprintf("  ✗ 失败: %s\n", e$message)); NULL })

cat("拟合 4 类抑郁轨迹模型...\n")
## 拟合 4 类抑郁轨迹模型...
m_dep_lcga_4 <- tryCatch({
  gridsearch(
    rep = 50, maxiter = 30, minit = m_dep_lcga_1,
    hlme(AD_5 ~ Time + Age_centered + hc04 + et_1_ref,
         mixture = ~ Time, random = ~ 1, subject = 'token_num', ng = 4,
         data = df_lcmm, verbose = FALSE, maxiter = 1000)
  )
}, error = function(e) { cat(sprintf("  ✗ 失败: %s\n", e$message)); NULL })
dep_models <- list(m_dep_lcga_1, m_dep_lcga_2, m_dep_lcga_3, m_dep_lcga_4)
dep_models <- dep_models[!sapply(dep_models, is.null)]

best_dep_model <- dep_models[[1]]
best_dep_idx <- 1

if (length(dep_models) > 1) {
  # [修复] 检查类别占比时使用 nrow(model$pprob) 而非 nrow(data)
  valid_dep_models <- list(dep_models[[1]])  # 1-class always valid
  for (i in 2:length(dep_models)) {
    m <- dep_models[[i]]
    if (!is.null(m) && !is.null(m$pprob)) {
      class_props <- table(m$pprob$class) / nrow(m$pprob)
      if (min(class_props) > 0.05) {
        valid_dep_models <- c(valid_dep_models, list(m))
        cat(sprintf("✓ %d 类模型有效（最小类: %.1f%%）\n", i, min(class_props) * 100))
      } else {
        cat(sprintf("✗ %d 类模型有空类（最小: %.1f%%）\n", i, min(class_props) * 100))
      }
    }
  }
  
  if (length(valid_dep_models) > 1) {
    dep_compare <- do.call(summarytable, valid_dep_models)
    cat("\n抑郁轨迹模型比较：\n")
    print(dep_compare)
    
    best_dep_idx <- which.min(sapply(valid_dep_models, function(m) m$BIC))
    best_dep_model <- valid_dep_models[[best_dep_idx]]
    cat(sprintf("\n✓ 最优: %d 类 (BIC = %.1f)\n", 
                best_dep_model$ng, best_dep_model$BIC))
  } else {
    cat("\n仅 1 类模型通过验证\n")
  }
} else {
  cat("仅 1 类模型成功拟合\n")
}
## ✓ 2 类模型有效（最小类: 12.1%）
## ✓ 3 类模型有效（最小类: 7.1%）
## ✓ 4 类模型有效（最小类: 13.6%）
##                  G    loglik npm      BIC    %class1  %class2   %class3 %class4
## 12769            1 -42581.83   7 85229.84 100.000000                           
## 1                2 -39968.29  10 80031.14  87.939541 12.06046                  
## c(1, 0, 0, 0, 0) 3 -39054.10  13 78231.11   7.768815 85.08889  7.142298        
## c(0, 0, 0, 0, 0) 4 -39968.29  16 80087.87  86.365416  0.00000 13.634584       0
## 
## 抑郁轨迹模型比较：
##                  G    loglik npm      BIC    %class1  %class2   %class3 %class4
## 12769            1 -42581.83   7 85229.84 100.000000       NA        NA      NA
## 1                2 -39968.29  10 80031.14  87.939541 12.06046        NA      NA
## c(1, 0, 0, 0, 0) 3 -39054.10  13 78231.11   7.768815 85.08889  7.142298      NA
## c(0, 0, 0, 0, 0) 4 -39968.29  16 80087.87  86.365416  0.00000 13.634584       0
## 
## ✓ 最优: 3 类 (BIC = 78231.1)

5.2 BMI 的潜类别轨迹

m_bmi_lcga_1 <- hlme(
  NS_1 ~ Time, random = ~ 1, subject = 'token_num', ng = 1,
  data = df_lcmm, verbose = FALSE
)

# =====================================================================
# BMI LCGA：已在多次前序测试中确认无法收敛（BMI 个体内变异过小）
# 此处仅保留 5 次快速尝试作为正式记录，失败后直接使用 WHO BMI 分类替代
# =====================================================================
cat("尝试拟合 BMI 潜类别模型（5 次快速尝试）...\n\n")
## 尝试拟合 BMI 潜类别模型（5 次快速尝试）...
bmi_lcga_success <- FALSE

m_bmi_lcga_2 <- tryCatch({
  model <- gridsearch(
    rep = 5, maxiter = 10, minit = m_bmi_lcga_1,
    hlme(NS_1 ~ Time, mixture = ~ Time, random = ~ 1,
         subject = 'token_num', ng = 2,
         data = df_lcmm, verbose = FALSE, maxiter = 500)
  )
  if (!is.null(model) && model$conv %in% c(1,2,3)) {
    class_props <- table(model$pprob$class) / nrow(model$pprob)
    if (min(class_props) > 0.05) {
      cat(sprintf("✓ 2 类收敛（最小类: %.1f%%）\n", min(class_props) * 100))
      model
    } else { cat(sprintf("✗ 2 类有空类（%.1f%%）\n", min(class_props)*100)); NULL }
  } else { cat("✗ 2 类未收敛\n"); NULL }
}, error = function(e) { cat(sprintf("✗ 2 类失败: %s\n", e$message)); NULL })
## Infinite parameters...
## Last step values :
##       b : 0 26.02999 26.06917 0.01692388 0.01973862 4.788528 2.235096 
##       objective function : -1000000000 
##       Convergence criteria: parameters stability= 1.0001 
##                           : function stability= 1.0001 
##                           : best relative distance to maximum obtained (RDM)= 1 
## Infinite parameters...
## Last step values :
##       b : 0 26.00485 26.11868 0.01740539 0.01923915 4.795411 2.230986 
##       objective function : -1000000000 
##       Convergence criteria: parameters stability= 1.0001 
##                           : function stability= 1.0001 
##                           : best relative distance to maximum obtained (RDM)= 1 
## Infinite parameters...
## Last step values :
##       b : 0 26.03584 26.07957 0.0175254 0.01793936 4.812153 2.23933 
##       objective function : -1000000000 
##       Convergence criteria: parameters stability= 1.0001 
##                           : function stability= 1.0001 
##                           : best relative distance to maximum obtained (RDM)= 1 
## Infinite parameters...
## Last step values :
##       b : 0 26.06751 25.99141 0.02305388 0.02087689 4.709795 2.238279 
##       objective function : -1000000000 
##       Convergence criteria: parameters stability= 1.0001 
##                           : function stability= 1.0001 
##                           : best relative distance to maximum obtained (RDM)= 1 
## Infinite parameters...
## Last step values :
##       b : 0 26.0946 26.09098 0.02007365 0.02012609 4.768616 2.238101 
##       objective function : -1000000000 
##       Convergence criteria: parameters stability= 1.0001 
##                           : function stability= 1.0001 
##                           : best relative distance to maximum obtained (RDM)= 1 
## ✗ 2 类失败: the leading minor of order 1 is not positive
bmi_models <- list(m_bmi_lcga_1, m_bmi_lcga_2)
bmi_models <- bmi_models[!sapply(bmi_models, is.null)]
best_bmi_model <- NULL

if (length(bmi_models) > 1) {
  bmi_compare <- do.call(summarytable, bmi_models)
  print(bmi_compare)
  best_bmi_idx <- which.min(sapply(bmi_models, function(m) m$BIC))
  best_bmi_model <- bmi_models[[best_bmi_idx]]
  bmi_lcga_success <- TRUE
} else {
  cat("\n⚠️ BMI 潜类别模型未能收敛（已在多次测试中确认）\n")
  cat("  原因：BMI 个体内变异过小（ICC = 0.81），无法识别不同的轨迹类别\n")
  cat("  替代方案：使用 WHO BMI 分类（Normal/Underweight/Overweight/Obese）\n")
}
## 
## ⚠️ BMI 潜类别模型未能收敛（已在多次测试中确认）
##   原因：BMI 个体内变异过小（ICC = 0.81），无法识别不同的轨迹类别
##   替代方案：使用 WHO BMI 分类（Normal/Underweight/Overweight/Obese）
if (bmi_lcga_success) {
  newdata_bmi_traj <- data.frame(Time = c(2, 6, 10, 15, 19))
  pred_bmi <- predictY(best_bmi_model, newdata_bmi_traj, var.time = "Time", draws = TRUE)
  plot(pred_bmi, main = sprintf("BMI Trajectories (%d Classes)", best_bmi_model$ng),
       xlab = "Survey Wave", ylab = "BMI", lwd = 3, shade = TRUE)
} else {
  df_longitudinal %>%
    filter(!is.na(BMI_category) & !is.na(NS_1)) %>%
    group_by(BMI_category, Time) %>%
    summarise(mean_bmi = mean(NS_1, na.rm = TRUE),
              se_bmi = sd(NS_1, na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(n()), .groups = "drop") %>%
    ggplot(aes(x = Time, y = mean_bmi, color = BMI_category, group = BMI_category)) +
    geom_line(linewidth = 1.2) + geom_point(size = 3) +
    geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = mean_bmi - 1.96*se_bmi, ymax = mean_bmi + 1.96*se_bmi), width = 0.4) +
    labs(title = "BMI Trajectories by WHO Category (Substitute for LCGA)",
         x = "Survey Wave", y = "Mean BMI", color = "BMI Category") +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 12)
}

BMI Trajectories

6 第三部分：Depression Trajectories by BMI Group

由于 BMI LCGA 未收敛且抑郁 LCGA 可能仅产生 1 个类别，本节改为直接分析各 BMI 类别中的抑郁纵向变化模式。

dep_by_bmi <- df_longitudinal %>%
  filter(!is.na(BMI_category) & !is.na(AD_5)) %>%
  group_by(BMI_category, Time) %>%
  summarise(mean_dep = mean(AD_5, na.rm = TRUE),
            se_dep = sd(AD_5, na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(n()), .groups = "drop")

ggplot(dep_by_bmi, aes(x = Time, y = mean_dep, color = BMI_category, group = BMI_category)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.2) + geom_point(size = 3) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = mean_dep - 1.96*se_dep, ymax = mean_dep + 1.96*se_dep), width = 0.4) +
  labs(title = "Depression Trajectories by WHO BMI Category",
       x = "Survey Wave", y = "Mean Depression Score", color = "BMI Category") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12)

Depression Trajectories by BMI Category 

# 正式检验：BMI 类别是否预测不同的抑郁轨迹
m_bmi_cat_trajectory <- lmer(
  AD_5 ~ BMI_category * Time + Age_centered + hc04 + et_1_ref + (1 | token),
  data = df_longitudinal, REML = FALSE
)

tab_model(m_bmi_cat_trajectory, show.ci = 0.95,
          title = "Depression Trajectories by BMI Category (Mixed Model)")
Depression Trajectories by BMI Category (Mixed Model)
  AD_5
Predictors Estimates CI p
(Intercept) 0.59 0.55 – 0.63 <0.001
BMI category
[Underweight] 		0.18 0.06 – 0.29 0.003
BMI category [Overweight] 0.06 0.02 – 0.10 0.003
BMI category [Obese] 0.22 0.17 – 0.26 <0.001
Time -0.00 -0.01 – -0.00 0.001
Age centered -0.01 -0.01 – -0.01 <0.001
hc04 [2] 0.14 0.11 – 0.17 <0.001
et 1 ref [2] -0.13 -0.16 – -0.09 <0.001
BMI category
[Underweight] × Time 		-0.00 -0.01 – 0.00 0.318
BMI category [Overweight]
× Time 		0.00 -0.00 – 0.00 0.398
BMI category [Obese] ×
Time 		-0.00 -0.00 – 0.00 0.946
Random Effects
σ2 0.36
τ00 token 0.51
ICC 0.59
N token 12769
Observations 35875
Marginal R2 / Conditional R2 0.056 / 0.614 
# 如果抑郁 LCGA 产生了多个类别，做交叉分析
if (best_dep_model$ng > 1) {
  dep_classes <- data.frame(
    token_num = best_dep_model$pprob$token_num,
    dep_class = best_dep_model$pprob$class
  ) %>% distinct(token_num, .keep_all = TRUE)
  
  bmi_mode_per_person <- df_longitudinal %>%
    filter(!is.na(BMI_category)) %>%
    group_by(token_num) %>%
    summarise(bmi_group = names(sort(table(BMI_category), decreasing = TRUE))[1],
              .groups = "drop")
  
  joint_classes <- dep_classes %>%
    left_join(bmi_mode_per_person, by = "token_num") %>%
    filter(!is.na(bmi_group))
  
  cross_table <- table(Depression_Class = joint_classes$dep_class,
                       BMI_Group = joint_classes$bmi_group)
  
  cat("交叉分类表（人数）：\n"); print(cross_table)
  cat("\n交叉分类表（百分比）：\n"); print(round(prop.table(cross_table) * 100, 2))
  
  if (nrow(cross_table) > 1 && ncol(cross_table) > 1) {
    chi_test <- chisq.test(cross_table)
    cat(sprintf("\nχ² = %.2f, p = %.4f\n", chi_test$statistic, chi_test$p.value))
  }
  
  # 热图
  cross_data <- as.data.frame(cross_table)
  names(cross_data) <- c("Depression_Class", "BMI_Group", "Freq")
  ggplot(cross_data, aes(x = Depression_Class, y = BMI_Group, fill = Freq)) +
    geom_tile(color = "white") + geom_text(aes(label = Freq), size = 5) +
    scale_fill_gradient(low = "white", high = "#E74C3C") +
    labs(title = "Joint Distribution: Depression Classes × BMI Categories",
         x = "Depression Trajectory Class", y = "BMI Category (WHO)") +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 12)
} else {
  cat("抑郁 LCGA 仅产生 1 个类别，跳过交叉分析。\n")
  cat("上方的 BMI 类别分层分析已替代此部分。\n")
}
## 交叉分类表（人数）：
##                 BMI_Group
## Depression_Class Normal Obese Overweight Underweight
##                1    394   241        331          26
##                2   5189  1822       3667         187
##                3    343   241        307          21
## 
## 交叉分类表（百分比）：
##                 BMI_Group
## Depression_Class Normal Obese Overweight Underweight
##                1   3.09  1.89       2.59        0.20
##                2  40.64 14.27      28.72        1.46
##                3   2.69  1.89       2.40        0.16
## 
## χ² = 101.06, p = 0.0000

7 第四部分：亚组分析

7.1 性别分层分析

7.1.1 模型结果

m_male <- lmer(
  AD_5 ~ NS_1 * Time + Age_centered + et_1_ref + (1 | token),
  data = df_longitudinal %>% filter(hc04 == 1), REML = FALSE
)

m_female <- lmer(
  AD_5 ~ NS_1 * Time + Age_centered + et_1_ref + (1 | token),
  data = df_longitudinal %>% filter(hc04 == 2), REML = FALSE
)

tab_model(m_male, m_female, show.ci = 0.95, dv.labels = c("Male", "Female"))

Predictors Estimates CI p Estimates CI p

Time 0.01 -0.01 – 0.02 0.383 -0.01 -0.01 – 0.00 0.196
Age_centered -0.01 -0.02 – -0.01 <0.001 -0.01 -0.02 – -0.01 <0.001

7.1.2 效应对比图

make_pred_plot <- function(model, data_subset, title_text) {
  bmi_seq <- seq(quantile(data_subset$NS_1, 0.05, na.rm = TRUE),
                 quantile(data_subset$NS_1, 0.95, na.rm = TRUE), length.out = 50)
  nd <- expand.grid(NS_1 = bmi_seq, Time = c(2, 10, 19)) %>%
    mutate(Age_centered = 0,
           et_1_ref = factor(levels(data_subset$et_1_ref)[1], levels = levels(data_subset$et_1_ref)))
  nd$pred <- predict(model, newdata = nd, re.form = NA)
  ggplot(nd, aes(x = NS_1, y = pred, color = factor(Time))) +
    geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
    labs(title = title_text, x = "BMI", y = "Predicted Depression", color = "Wave") +
    theme_minimal()
}

p_male <- make_pred_plot(m_male, df_longitudinal %>% filter(hc04 == 1), "Male")
p_female <- make_pred_plot(m_female, df_longitudinal %>% filter(hc04 == 2), "Female")
p_male + p_female + plot_annotation(title = "BMI → Depression by Gender")

BMI-Depression Association by Gender

7.2 年龄组分层分析

df_age_groups <- df_longitudinal %>%
  mutate(age_group = cut(hc_01_ref, breaks = c(0, 40, 60, 100),
                         labels = c("Young (<40)", "Middle (40-60)", "Older (>60)")))

cat("年龄组分布（纵向样本）：\n")
## 年龄组分布（纵向样本）：
print(table(df_age_groups$age_group, useNA = "ifany"))
## 
##    Young (<40) Middle (40-60)    Older (>60) 
##           6676          16403          15456
age_model_results <- list()
for (age_grp in c("Young (<40)", "Middle (40-60)", "Older (>60)")) {
  tryCatch({
    data_subset <- df_age_groups %>% filter(age_group == age_grp)
    if (nrow(data_subset) > 100) {
      model <- lmer(AD_5 ~ NS_1 * Time + hc04 + et_1_ref + (1 | token),
                    data = data_subset, REML = FALSE)
      age_model_results[[age_grp]] <- model
      cat(sprintf("✓ %s (n = %d)\n", age_grp, nrow(data_subset)))
    }
  }, error = function(e) { cat(sprintf("✗ %s: %s\n", age_grp, e$message)) })
}
## ✓ Young (<40) (n = 6676)
## ✓ Middle (40-60) (n = 16403)
## ✓ Older (>60) (n = 15456)
if (length(age_model_results) == 3) {
  tab_model(age_model_results[[1]], age_model_results[[2]], age_model_results[[3]],
            show.ci = 0.95, dv.labels = names(age_model_results))
} else if (length(age_model_results) == 2) {
  tab_model(age_model_results[[1]], age_model_results[[2]],
            show.ci = 0.95, dv.labels = names(age_model_results))
}
  Young (<40) Middle (40-60) Older (>60)
Predictors Estimates CI p Estimates CI p Estimates CI p
(Intercept) 0.48 0.21 – 0.75 <0.001 0.29 0.12 – 0.45 0.001 0.15 0.02 – 0.28 0.020
BMI - continuous 0.03 0.02 – 0.04 <0.001 0.02 0.01 – 0.02 <0.001 0.01 0.00 – 0.01 0.003

et_1_ref: et_1_ref2 -0.33 -0.43 – -0.23 <0.001 -0.12 -0.18 – -0.07 <0.001 -0.05 -0.09 – -0.01 0.012
NS_1:Time -0.00 -0.00 – 0.00 0.800 0.00 -0.00 – 0.00 0.493 -0.00 -0.00 – 0.00 0.470
Random Effects

τ00 0.64 token 0.61 token 0.33 token
ICC 0.57 0.59 0.59
N 4831 token 4831 token 4831 token
Observations 6337 15255 14283
Marginal R2 / Conditional R2 0.034 / 0.582 0.015 / 0.599 0.012 / 0.593 
age_plots <- lapply(names(age_model_results), function(grp) {
  mod <- age_model_results[[grp]]
  sub_data <- df_age_groups %>% filter(age_group == grp)
  bmi_seq <- seq(quantile(sub_data$NS_1, 0.05, na.rm = TRUE),
                 quantile(sub_data$NS_1, 0.95, na.rm = TRUE), length.out = 50)
  nd <- expand.grid(NS_1 = bmi_seq, Time = c(2, 10, 19)) %>%
    mutate(hc04 = factor(levels(sub_data$hc04)[1], levels = levels(sub_data$hc04)),
           et_1_ref = factor(levels(sub_data$et_1_ref)[1], levels = levels(sub_data$et_1_ref)))
  nd$pred <- predict(mod, newdata = nd, re.form = NA)
  ggplot(nd, aes(x = NS_1, y = pred, color = factor(Time))) +
    geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
    labs(title = grp, x = "BMI", y = "Predicted Depression", color = "Wave") +
    theme_minimal()
})

if (length(age_plots) == 3) {
  age_plots[[1]] + age_plots[[2]] + age_plots[[3]]
} else if (length(age_plots) == 2) {
  age_plots[[1]] + age_plots[[2]]
}

BMI-Depression Association by Age Group

7.3 教育水平分层分析

教育变量 et_1_ref：1 = 无高中学历（约 27%），2 = 有高中学历（约 73%）。

cat("教育水平分布（纵向样本）：\n")
## 教育水平分布（纵向样本）：
print(table(df_longitudinal$et_1_ref, useNA = "ifany"))
## 
##     1     2  <NA> 
##  9558 28887    90
# 无高中学历
m_edu_low <- lmer(
  AD_5 ~ NS_1 * Time + Age_centered + hc04 + (1 | token),
  data = df_longitudinal %>% filter(et_1_ref == 1), REML = FALSE
)

# 有高中学历
m_edu_high <- lmer(
  AD_5 ~ NS_1 * Time + Age_centered + hc04 + (1 | token),
  data = df_longitudinal %>% filter(et_1_ref == 2), REML = FALSE
)

tab_model(m_edu_low, m_edu_high, show.ci = 0.95,
          dv.labels = c("No High School Diploma", "High School Diploma or Above"))

# 教育分层模型中没有 et_1_ref，需要单独构建预测
make_edu_pred_plot <- function(model, data_subset, title_text) {
  bmi_seq <- seq(quantile(data_subset$NS_1, 0.05, na.rm = TRUE),
                 quantile(data_subset$NS_1, 0.95, na.rm = TRUE), length.out = 50)
  nd <- expand.grid(NS_1 = bmi_seq, Time = c(2, 10, 19)) %>%
    mutate(Age_centered = 0,
           hc04 = factor(levels(data_subset$hc04)[1], levels = levels(data_subset$hc04)))
  nd$pred <- predict(model, newdata = nd, re.form = NA)
  ggplot(nd, aes(x = NS_1, y = pred, color = factor(Time))) +
    geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
    labs(title = title_text, x = "BMI", y = "Predicted Depression", color = "Wave") +
    theme_minimal()
}

p_edu_low <- make_edu_pred_plot(m_edu_low, 
                                df_longitudinal %>% filter(et_1_ref == 1), 
                                "No High School Diploma")
p_edu_high <- make_edu_pred_plot(m_edu_high, 
                                 df_longitudinal %>% filter(et_1_ref == 2), 
                                 "High School Diploma+")

p_edu_low + p_edu_high + plot_annotation(title = "BMI → Depression by Education Level")

BMI-Depression Association by Education Level

8 第五部分：非线性关系探索

8.1 BMI 二次项检验

df_quad <- df_longitudinal %>% mutate(BMI_squared = NS_1^2)

m_linear <- lmer(AD_5 ~ NS_1 + Time + Age_centered + hc04 + et_1_ref + (1 | token),
                 data = df_quad, REML = FALSE)
m_quadratic <- lmer(AD_5 ~ NS_1 + BMI_squared + Time + Age_centered + hc04 + et_1_ref + (1 | token),
                    data = df_quad, REML = FALSE)

cat("模型比较（线性 vs 二次）：\n")
## 模型比较（线性 vs 二次）：
anova_result <- anova(m_linear, m_quadratic)
print(anova_result)
## Data: df_quad
## Models:
## m_linear: AD_5 ~ NS_1 + Time + Age_centered + hc04 + et_1_ref + (1 | token)
## m_quadratic: AD_5 ~ NS_1 + BMI_squared + Time + Age_centered + hc04 + et_1_ref + (1 | token)
##             npar   AIC   BIC logLik -2*log(L)  Chisq Df     Pr(>Chisq)    
## m_linear       8 85048 85116 -42516     85032                             
## m_quadratic    9 85015 85091 -42498     84997 35.093  1 0.000000003142 ***
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
if (anova_result$`Pr(>Chisq)`[2] < 0.05) {
  cat(sprintf("\n✓ 存在显著的非线性关系 (BMI²: β = %.5f, p < .001)\n",
              fixef(m_quadratic)["BMI_squared"]))
} else {
  cat("\n→ 未发现显著的非线性关系\n")
}
## 
## ✓ 存在显著的非线性关系 (BMI²: β = -0.00013, p < .001)

8.2 BMI 分类模型

m_categorical <- lmer(
  AD_5 ~ BMI_category * Time + Age_centered + hc04 + et_1_ref + (1 | token),
  data = df_longitudinal, REML = FALSE
)

tab_model(m_categorical, show.ci = 0.95, title = "Depression by BMI Category")

nd_cat <- expand.grid(Time = seq(2, 19, length.out = 50),
                      BMI_category = levels(df_longitudinal$BMI_category)) %>%
  mutate(Age_centered = 0,
         hc04 = factor(levels(df_longitudinal$hc04)[1], levels = levels(df_longitudinal$hc04)),
         et_1_ref = factor(levels(df_longitudinal$et_1_ref)[1], levels = levels(df_longitudinal$et_1_ref))) %>%
  filter(!is.na(BMI_category))
nd_cat$pred <- predict(m_categorical, newdata = nd_cat, re.form = NA)

ggplot(nd_cat, aes(x = Time, y = pred, color = BMI_category)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.2) +
  labs(title = "Depression by BMI Category Over Time",
       x = "Survey Wave", y = "Predicted Depression Score", color = "BMI Category") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12)

Depression by BMI Category Over Time

9 第六部分：交叉滞后面板模型（CLPM）

# [修复] 聚合重复条目后再 pivot_wider
df_wide <- df_longitudinal %>%
  dplyr::select(token, Time, NS_1, AD_5) %>%
  filter(!is.na(NS_1) & !is.na(AD_5)) %>%
  group_by(token, Time) %>%
  summarise(NS_1 = mean(NS_1, na.rm = TRUE),
            AD_5 = mean(AD_5, na.rm = TRUE),
            .groups = "drop") %>%
  pivot_wider(id_cols = token, names_from = Time,
              values_from = c(NS_1, AD_5), names_sep = "_t")

available_waves <- sort(unique(df_longitudinal$Time))
cat("可用波次:", paste(available_waves, collapse = ", "), "\n")
## 可用波次: 2, 6, 10, 15, 19
cat("宽格式数据:", nrow(df_wide), "个体\n")
## 宽格式数据: 12808 个体
# 构建 CLPM 语法
build_clpm_syntax <- function(waves) {
  syntax <- ""
  for (i in 2:length(waves)) {
    t_curr <- waves[i]; t_prev <- waves[i - 1]
    syntax <- paste0(syntax,
      sprintf("  NS_1_t%d ~ a%d * NS_1_t%d\n", t_curr, i, t_prev),
      sprintf("  AD_5_t%d ~ b%d * AD_5_t%d\n", t_curr, i, t_prev),
      sprintf("  AD_5_t%d ~ c%d * NS_1_t%d\n", t_curr, i, t_prev),
      sprintf("  NS_1_t%d ~ d%d * AD_5_t%d\n", t_curr, i, t_prev),
      sprintf("  NS_1_t%d ~~ AD_5_t%d\n", t_curr, t_curr))
  }
  syntax <- paste0(syntax, sprintf("  NS_1_t%d ~~ AD_5_t%d\n", waves[1], waves[1]))
  return(syntax)
}

clpm_waves <- available_waves[1:min(4, length(available_waves))]
clpm_syntax <- build_clpm_syntax(clpm_waves)
cat("\nCLPM 语法（使用波次:", paste(clpm_waves, collapse=", "), "）：\n")
## 
## CLPM 语法（使用波次: 2, 6, 10, 15 ）：
cat(clpm_syntax)
##   NS_1_t6 ~ a2 * NS_1_t2
##   AD_5_t6 ~ b2 * AD_5_t2
##   AD_5_t6 ~ c2 * NS_1_t2
##   NS_1_t6 ~ d2 * AD_5_t2
##   NS_1_t6 ~~ AD_5_t6
##   NS_1_t10 ~ a3 * NS_1_t6
##   AD_5_t10 ~ b3 * AD_5_t6
##   AD_5_t10 ~ c3 * NS_1_t6
##   NS_1_t10 ~ d3 * AD_5_t6
##   NS_1_t10 ~~ AD_5_t10
##   NS_1_t15 ~ a4 * NS_1_t10
##   AD_5_t15 ~ b4 * AD_5_t10
##   AD_5_t15 ~ c4 * NS_1_t10
##   NS_1_t15 ~ d4 * AD_5_t10
##   NS_1_t15 ~~ AD_5_t15
##   NS_1_t2 ~~ AD_5_t2
clpm_fit <- tryCatch({
  sem(clpm_syntax, data = df_wide, missing = "fiml", estimator = "MLR")
}, error = function(e) {
  cat(sprintf("\nCLPM 拟合失败: %s\n", e$message))
  NULL
})

if (!is.null(clpm_fit)) {
  cat("\n\nCLPM 模型拟合指标：\n")
  fit_indices <- fitMeasures(clpm_fit, c("cfi", "tli", "rmsea", "srmr", "chisq", "df", "pvalue"))
  print(round(fit_indices, 4))
  
  # 拟合质量评估
  cfi_val <- fit_indices["cfi"]
  rmsea_val <- fit_indices["rmsea"]
  if (cfi_val < 0.90 || rmsea_val > 0.10) {
    cat("\n⚠️ 注意：CLPM 模型拟合指标不理想（CFI < 0.90 或 RMSEA > 0.10）\n")
    cat("  可能原因：(1) 波次间隔不等距；(2) 缺少约束（如路径等值约束）；\n")
    cat("  (3) 传统 CLPM 未分离 trait/state 方差（RI-CLPM 可能更合适）\n")
    cat("  建议：在论文中报告 CLPM 结果但注明拟合局限，交叉滞后系数仅作参考\n\n")
  }
  
  cat("\n参数估计：\n")
  summary(clpm_fit, standardized = TRUE)
  
  # 提取交叉滞后路径
  params <- parameterEstimates(clpm_fit, standardized = TRUE)
  cross_lag <- params %>% filter(grepl("^c|^d", label))
  
  cat("\n关键交叉滞后路径（BMI ↔ Depression）：\n")
  print(cross_lag %>% dplyr::select(lhs, op, rhs, label, est, se, pvalue, std.all))
} else {
  cat("CLPM 未能成功拟合。\n")
}
## 
## 
## CLPM 模型拟合指标：
##      cfi      tli    rmsea     srmr    chisq       df   pvalue 
##    0.816    0.570    0.210    0.109 6820.684   12.000    0.000 
## 
## ⚠️ 注意：CLPM 模型拟合指标不理想（CFI < 0.90 或 RMSEA > 0.10）
##   可能原因：(1) 波次间隔不等距；(2) 缺少约束（如路径等值约束）；
##   (3) 传统 CLPM 未分离 trait/state 方差（RI-CLPM 可能更合适）
##   建议：在论文中报告 CLPM 结果但注明拟合局限，交叉滞后系数仅作参考
## 
## 
## 参数估计：
## 
## 关键交叉滞后路径（BMI ↔ Depression）：
##        lhs op      rhs label    est    se pvalue std.all
## 1  AD_5_t6  ~  NS_1_t2    c2  0.008 0.002  0.000   0.039
## 2  NS_1_t6  ~  AD_5_t2    d2  0.081 0.026  0.002   0.015
## 3 AD_5_t10  ~  NS_1_t6    c3  0.006 0.002  0.001   0.032
## 4 NS_1_t10  ~  AD_5_t6    d3 -0.012 0.039  0.754  -0.002
## 5 AD_5_t15  ~ NS_1_t10    c4  0.003 0.002  0.107   0.020
## 6 NS_1_t15  ~ AD_5_t10    d4  0.296 0.084  0.000   0.059

10 第七部分：敏感性分析

10.1 全样本 vs 纵向样本对比

# 在全样本上重新拟合核心模型进行对比
m_full_bmi_dep <- lmer(
  AD_5 ~ NS_1 * Time + Age_centered + hc04 + et_1_ref + (1 | token),
  data = df_model, REML = FALSE,
  control = lmerControl(optimizer = "bobyqa", optCtrl = list(maxfun = 2e5))
)

# 提取关键系数进行对比
sensitivity_table <- data.frame(
  Parameter = c("BMI (β)", "BMI × Time (β)", "BMI p-value", "BMI×Time p-value",
                "N observations", "N individuals", "Marginal R²"),
  `Full Sample` = c(
    round(fixef(m_full_bmi_dep)["NS_1"], 4),
    round(fixef(m_full_bmi_dep)["NS_1:Time"], 5),
    formatC(summary(m_full_bmi_dep)$coefficients["NS_1", "Pr(>|t|)"], format = "e", digits = 2),
    round(summary(m_full_bmi_dep)$coefficients["NS_1:Time", "Pr(>|t|)"], 4),
    nobs(m_full_bmi_dep),
    summary(m_full_bmi_dep)$ngrps,
    round(r2_nakagawa(m_full_bmi_dep)$R2_marginal, 4)
  ),
  `Longitudinal Sample` = c(
    round(fixef(m_bmi_to_dep)["NS_1"], 4),
    round(fixef(m_bmi_to_dep)["NS_1:Time"], 5),
    formatC(summary(m_bmi_to_dep)$coefficients["NS_1", "Pr(>|t|)"], format = "e", digits = 2),
    round(summary(m_bmi_to_dep)$coefficients["NS_1:Time", "Pr(>|t|)"], 4),
    nobs(m_bmi_to_dep),
    summary(m_bmi_to_dep)$ngrps,
    round(r2_nakagawa(m_bmi_to_dep)$R2_marginal, 4)
  ),
  check.names = FALSE
)

sensitivity_table %>%
  knitr::kable(caption = "Sensitivity Analysis: Full Sample vs Longitudinal Sample (≥2 Waves)")
Sensitivity Analysis: Full Sample vs Longitudinal Sample (≥2 Waves)
Parameter Full Sample Longitudinal Sample
BMI (β) 0.0181 0.0128
BMI × Time (β) -0.00023 0.00002
BMI p-value 2.42e-38 1.74e-13
BMI×Time p-value 0.0671 0.8917
N observations 51130 35875
N individuals 28024 12769
Marginal R² 0.0637 0.0541

11 结果汇总

cat("=== BMI 与抑郁双向关系分析结果汇总 ===\n\n")
## === BMI 与抑郁双向关系分析结果汇总 ===
cat("样本信息\n")
## 样本信息
cat(sprintf("  全样本: %d 观测, %d 个体\n", nrow(df_model), n_distinct(df_model$token)))
##   全样本: 65764 观测, 37293 个体
cat(sprintf("  纵向样本 (≥2 waves): %d 观测, %d 个体\n\n",
            nrow(df_longitudinal), n_distinct(df_longitudinal$token)))
##   纵向样本 (≥2 waves): 38535 观测, 12808 个体
cat("1. 双向关系（同期）\n")
## 1. 双向关系（同期）
cat(sprintf("   BMI → 抑郁: β = %.4f, p = %s\n",
            fixef(m_bmi_to_dep)["NS_1"],
            formatC(summary(m_bmi_to_dep)$coefficients["NS_1", "Pr(>|t|)"], format="e", digits=2)))
##    BMI → 抑郁: β = 0.0128, p = 1.74e-13
cat(sprintf("   抑郁 → BMI: β = %.4f, p = %s\n\n",
            fixef(m_dep_to_bmi)["AD_5"],
            formatC(summary(m_dep_to_bmi)$coefficients["AD_5", "Pr(>|t|)"], format="e", digits=2)))
##    抑郁 → BMI: β = 0.0627, p = 6.64e-02
cat("2. 滞后效应\n")
## 2. 滞后效应
cat(sprintf("   上期 BMI → 当期抑郁: β = %.3f, p = %.4f\n",
            fixef(m_lagged_bmi_dep)["BMI_lag1"],
            summary(m_lagged_bmi_dep)$coefficients["BMI_lag1", "Pr(>|t|)"]))
##    上期 BMI → 当期抑郁: β = 0.002, p = 0.2168
cat(sprintf("   上期抑郁 → 当期 BMI: β = %.3f, p = %.4f\n\n",
            fixef(m_lagged_dep_bmi)["Depression_lag1"],
            summary(m_lagged_dep_bmi)$coefficients["Depression_lag1", "Pr(>|t|)"]))
##    上期抑郁 → 当期 BMI: β = 0.048, p = 0.0931
cat("3. 疫情阶段调节\n")
## 3. 疫情阶段调节
cat(sprintf("   BMI × Phase: p = %.4f\n",
            summary(m_phase_mod_dep)$coefficients["NS_1:PhasePost-Pandemic", "Pr(>|t|)"]))
##    BMI × Phase: p = 0.1815
cat(sprintf("   Depression × Phase: p = %.4f\n\n",
            summary(m_phase_mod_bmi)$coefficients["AD_5:PhasePost-Pandemic", "Pr(>|t|)"]))
##    Depression × Phase: p = 0.0054
cat("4. 抑郁潜类别轨迹\n")
## 4. 抑郁潜类别轨迹
cat(sprintf("   最优类别数: %d (BIC = %.1f)\n\n", best_dep_model$ng, best_dep_model$BIC))
##    最优类别数: 3 (BIC = 78231.1)
cat("5. BMI 潜类别轨迹\n")
## 5. BMI 潜类别轨迹
if (bmi_lcga_success) {
  cat(sprintf("   最优类别数: %d (BIC = %.1f)\n\n", best_bmi_model$ng, best_bmi_model$BIC))
} else {
  cat("   状态: LCGA 未收敛，改用 WHO BMI 分类\n\n")
}
##    状态: LCGA 未收敛，改用 WHO BMI 分类
cat("6. 非线性关系\n")
## 6. 非线性关系
cat(sprintf("   BMI² 显著性: p = %.2e\n\n", anova_result$`Pr(>Chisq)`[2]))
##    BMI² 显著性: p = 3.14e-09
cat("7. BMI 分类效应 (vs Normal)\n")
## 7. BMI 分类效应 (vs Normal)
cat(sprintf("   Underweight: β = %.3f, p = %.4f\n",
            fixef(m_categorical)["BMI_categoryUnderweight"],
            summary(m_categorical)$coefficients["BMI_categoryUnderweight", "Pr(>|t|)"]))
##    Underweight: β = 0.176, p = 0.0031
cat(sprintf("   Overweight:  β = %.3f, p = %.4f\n",
            fixef(m_categorical)["BMI_categoryOverweight"],
            summary(m_categorical)$coefficients["BMI_categoryOverweight", "Pr(>|t|)"]))
##    Overweight:  β = 0.057, p = 0.0031
cat(sprintf("   Obese:       β = %.3f, p = %.4f\n\n",
            fixef(m_categorical)["BMI_categoryObese"],
            summary(m_categorical)$coefficients["BMI_categoryObese", "Pr(>|t|)"]))
##    Obese:       β = 0.217, p = 0.0000
cat("8. 性别差异\n")
## 8. 性别差异
cat(sprintf("   男性 BMI 效应: β = %.4f\n", fixef(m_male)["NS_1"]))
##    男性 BMI 效应: β = 0.0123
cat(sprintf("   女性 BMI 效应: β = %.4f\n\n", fixef(m_female)["NS_1"]))
##    女性 BMI 效应: β = 0.0142
cat("9. 年龄梯度\n")
## 9. 年龄梯度
for (grp in names(age_model_results)) {
  cat(sprintf("   %s: β(BMI) = %.4f\n", grp, fixef(age_model_results[[grp]])["NS_1"]))
}
##    Young (<40): β(BMI) = 0.0256
##    Middle (40-60): β(BMI) = 0.0158
##    Older (>60): β(BMI) = 0.0069
cat("\n10. 教育水平差异\n")
## 
## 10. 教育水平差异
cat(sprintf("   无高中学历 BMI 效应: β = %.4f\n", fixef(m_edu_low)["NS_1"]))
##    无高中学历 BMI 效应: β = 0.0152
cat(sprintf("   有高中学历 BMI 效应: β = %.4f\n", fixef(m_edu_high)["NS_1"]))
##    有高中学历 BMI 效应: β = 0.0121
save.image("comprehensive_analysis_FINAL.RData")
cat("\n✓ 工作空间已保存为 comprehensive_analysis_FINAL.RData\n")
## 
## ✓ 工作空间已保存为 comprehensive_analysis_FINAL.RData

12 附录：方法说明

12.1 与前版本的主要修改

  1. 样本筛选：纵向分析排除仅参与 1 个波次的个体（占 59%），保留 ≥2 波次的个体。描述性统计仍报告全样本。添加了全样本 vs 纵向样本的基线比较。

  2. 年龄异常值：移除 age > 100 的数据点（原始数据 max = 119，明显录入错误）。

  3. CLPM 修复：在 pivot_wider 前聚合重复条目（取均值），解决 “list object cannot be coerced to type double” 错误。添加了模型拟合质量自动评估和警告。

  4. 抑郁 LCGA 修复：改用 gridsearch（50 组随机起始值）。修正类别占比检查公式（使用 nrow(model$pprob) 而非 nrow(data)）。

  5. BMI LCGA 运行时间优化：将 gridsearch 从 30 次 × 30 步迭代降至 5 次 × 10 步（已在多次测试中确认无法收敛，无需反复尝试）。预计节省约 1.5 小时运行时间。

  6. tab_model CI 修复：将 show.ci = TRUE 改为 show.ci = 0.95，解决 “-Inf – Inf” 显示问题。

  7. 效应量：添加 r2_nakagawa() 报告边际和条件 R²。

  8. 敏感性分析：新增第七部分，对比全样本与纵向样本的核心模型结果。

  9. 联合轨迹分析重构：当 LCGA 未能产生多个类别时，改为 BMI 类别分层的抑郁轨迹分析。

  10. 移除随机斜率模型：因大多数个体观测不足（≤2 波次），该模型结构上不可行。

  11. 新增教育水平分层分析：按 et_1_ref（1 = 无高中学历，2 = 有高中学历）分层拟合 BMI→抑郁模型，与性别和年龄分层并列。

  12. Wave 1 → Wave 2 替换说明更新：明确记录 Wave 2 原始数据中不包含抑郁量表，Wave 1 和 Wave 2 调查时间非常接近，经导师确认可互换。
